use std::mem::MaybeUninit;

fn create_init_array() -> [u32; 10] {
    let mut arr = MaybeUninit::<[u32; 10]>::uninit();
    let ptr = arr.as_mut_ptr() as *mut u32;
    for i in 0..10 {
        unsafe {
            ptr.add(i).write(i as u32);
        }
    }
    unsafe { arr.assume_init() }
}

fn init_buffer(len: usize) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut buf = Vec::with_capacity(len);
    for i in 0..len {
        buf.push(0);
    }
    buf
}

fn safe_init_struct() -> Config {
    Config {
        port: 8080,
        debug: false,
        name: "default".to_string(),
    }
}

struct Config {
    port: u16,
    debug: bool,
    name: String,
}
